OUR SERVICES

Complete dental services for a healthy smile

Scaling & Gum Treatment

Deep cleaning to remove plaque and maintain healthy gums.

Root Canal Treatment (RCT)

Save infected teeth with painless root canal therapy.

Crown & Bridge

Restore damaged or missing teeth with durable, natural-looking restorations.

Dental Implants

Permanent tooth replacement for a confident, natural smile.

Orthodontic Treatments

Straighten teeth and perfect your smile with modern aligners or braces.

Pediatric Dentistry

Gentle, caring dental care for children’s healthy smiles.

Cosmetic Dentistry

Enhance your smile’s beauty with advanced cosmetic solutions.

Tooth Extraction

Safe and comfortable removal of damaged or problematic teeth.

Emergency Dental Care

Quick, reliable treatment for sudden dental pain or injury.

WHY CHOOSE US

Affordable & Transparent Treatment Plans

NRI DENTAL SERVICES AT TOOTHMATE

Your trusted dental care — no matter where you live.

Toothmate Multispeciality Dental Clinic offers exclusive dental treatment packages for NRI patients who visit Surat, India.

We understand that managing dental care abroad can be expensive and time-consuming — that’s why we provide world-class treatment, affordable pricing, and personalized care all in one

Dr. Mayuri Ranpariya

BDS-Dental Surgeon

Why NRIs Choose Toothmate

  • Flexible Appointments: Planned according to your travel dates.
  • Comprehensive Care: From root canal to implants — all under one roof.
  • Advanced Equipment: International-standard sterilization & technology.
  • Transparent Pricing: Clear treatment plans with no hidden costs.
  • Follow-up Support: Online consultation even after you return abroad.
  • Comfort & Care: English-speaking staff and friendly environment.

Popular NRI Treatments

  • Full Mouth Rehabilitation
  • Smile Makeover / Cosmetic Dentistry
  • Dental Implants & Crowns
  • Root Canal & Restorations
  • Teeth Whitening
  • Gum Care & Maintenance
Make an Appointment

Join us and create smiles that truly inspire confidence. Contact Us
